blocking_reason: Statement 5.1 is PFCE by item. The workbook supports exact item aggregation, but the strict households-only S14/P31 boundary and NPISH exclusion are not confirmed in this source file.
No deterministic official XLS/XLSX/CSV/SDMX/HTML Rosstat table with 2021 strict household COICOP-HH values has passed the gates.
Official NBS table is a household survey with eight combined groups, not national-accounts S14/P31 with twelve Armilar categories.
Official source identified in probe regroups COICOP and cannot be bridged exactly to twelve Armilar categories.
Official product tables would require many-to-many product-to-COICOP allocation.
Official HIECS is a survey source, not national-accounts S14/P31 current-price HFCE.
Public national-accounts source does not expose a twelve-category strict household table.
Official expenditure-GDP report publishes aggregate household consumption, not twelve categories.
Official HIES reference year and concept do not satisfy 2021 national-accounts HFCE gates.
Official VHLSS is 2022 survey evidence only, not exact 2021 S14/P31 HFCE.
